center.name: 大西洋比利牛斯省
center.summary: 大西洋比利牛斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Iberian chiffchaff，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Iberian Peninsula it breeds in the west and north, the northern Spanish population breeds from Galicia to Navarre in the Pyrenees, with a small number breeding in the Pyrénées-Atlantiques in France with separate scattered populations in the mountains of southern Spain

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Iberian Peninsula it breeds in the west and north, the northern Spanish population breeds from Galicia to Navarre in the Pyrenees, with a small number breeding in the Pyrénées-Atlantiques in France with separate scattered populations in the mountains of southern Spain
